items.question: What's the difference between subscriptions and credit packs?
items.answer: Subscriptions provide monthly credits for regular attractiveness testing that renew automatically. Credit packs are one-time purchases with no recurring charges, ideal for occasional face attractiveness tests.

items.question: Do my attractiveness test credits expire?
items.answer: No! All credits from both subscriptions and credit packs never expire. You can take the attractiveness test whenever you want with your available credits.

items.question: Can I cancel my attractiveness test subscription anytime?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your credits will remain available even after cancellation for future attractiveness tests.

items.question: How many credits does each attractiveness test cost?
items.answer: Each AI attractiveness test costs 1 credit. This includes complete facial analysis, beauty score, attractiveness rating, hotness level, and age detection.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and other secure payment methods through our payment processor for attractiveness test plans.

items.question: Is the attractiveness test really free?
items.answer: We offer a free trial attractiveness test for new users. After that, you can choose from our affordable pricing plans to continue taking unlimited face attractiveness tests.
